name: Puffco Travel Case
summary: Puffco Travel Case — a carry case for carrying your kit safely.
description: Its sleek, ridged aluminium exterior and magnetic lid provide secure storage for the Pivot + Hot Knife, up to 3 jars, cotton swabs, and other essentials. The soft silicone interior prevents rattling and there's even a hidden compartment for trash disposal. Stay organised and stylish with this specialized case. *Items shown in Travel Case not included Keeps your kit protected and discreet in transit.
